High Tier: Sign a maximum of 2 players per transfer window.
Mid Tier: You must sign at least 2 players under 23 every season.
Low Tier: You cannot sign players above 82 overall.

High Tier: At least 5 players in the starting XI must be from the club’s nation.
Mid Tier: You must sell any player if an offer arrives from a bigger club.
Low Tier: At least 5 academy players must be in the senior squad.

High Tier: At least 2 academy players must play 15+ matches every season.
Mid Tier: At least 4 academy players must be in the first-team squad.
Low Tier: You must sign at least 1 free agent every season.

High Tier: You must keep at least 1 player aged 30+ in the starting XI.
Mid Tier: You cannot sign players above 84 overall.
Low Tier: You cannot spend more than 50% of your transfer budget.

High Tier: Every squad player must play at least 10 matches per season.
Mid Tier: You must maintain a positive net spend every season.
Low Tier: At least 1 local nationality player must start every match.

High Tier: You cannot sign players with an overall higher than your current best player.
Mid Tier: At least 1 free transfer must be signed every year.
Low Tier: You must keep a positive transfer balance every season.

High Tier: At least 3 bench players must be academy graduates.
Mid Tier: You must use at least 1 loan player every season.
Low Tier: At least 2 youth players must debut every year.

High Tier: You must maintain a positive transfer budget every season.
Mid Tier: At least 50% of signings must come from smaller clubs.
Low Tier: You cannot sign players older than 29.

Low Tier: At least 1 player must stay at the club for 10 seasons.

Mid Tier: At least 1 player over 30 must play 20+ matches.
Low Tier: You cannot use financial takeovers.

Low Tier: At least 3 players under 21 must get regular game time.

Low Tier: You must avoid relegation for 3 straight seasons.

High Tier: You cannot have more than 25 senior players.
Mid Tier: You must keep wage growth under control and avoid doubling any player salary.
Low Tier: You cannot sign more than 2 foreign players per season.

Low Tier: At least 1 defender and 1 midfielder from the academy must become starters.

High Tier: You must score at least 10 goals from set pieces each season.

Low Tier: You must keep squad size below 21 senior players.

High Tier: You must keep at least 40% possession on average.
Mid Tier: You cannot have more than 22 senior players.
Low Tier: You cannot break the club transfer record.

Low Tier: You must score at least 1 goal from a corner every month.

Low Tier: You cannot sell more than 2 starters per season.
